title: elytrigia juncea subsp. pungens
intro: Elytrigia juncea subsp. pungens, also known as Russian wheatgrass or pungent Elytrigia, is a subspecies of a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems due to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elytrigia juncea subsp. pungens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve blood circulation, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Elytrigia juncea subsp. pungens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
